ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a superuser */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a staff member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, tenant, staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_password_reset" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password reset */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "account_locked" INTEGER /* Whether the account is locked due to multiple failed login attempts */,
  "two_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether two-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the group is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the group */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-group relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was added to the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the user to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the permission is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group-permission relationship */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was assigned to the group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the permission to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_permissions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residence_addresses" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residence address */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the residence address */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Whether this is the primary residence address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_residence_addresses" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-residence address relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "residence_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the residence address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user residence address relationship was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_residence_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_residence_addresses_residence_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("residence_address_id") REFERENCES residence_addresses ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of login */,
  "logout_date" TEXT /* Date and time of logout */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for login (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the login (e.g., city, country) */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the login attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
